name: Document Editor
description: Declares a document editor (a React UI for editing instances of one or more document models) shipped by a Vetra Reactor Package. Create one Document Editor document per editor, list the document types it can edit, then mark it CONFIRMED to trigger codegen of the editor scaffold under `editors/`. The boilerplate it produces is what you then customize.

global.schema:
"""
Configuration for a document editor contributed by the package. The editor is
registered against every document type listed in `documentTypes`; Connect picks
the first matching editor when opening a document.
"""
type DocumentEditorState {
  """Display name of the editor. Also determines the generated folder name under `editors/`."""
  name: String!
  """Document types this editor can edit. Each entry has a stable id so it can be removed individually."""
  documentTypes: [DocumentTypeItem!]!
  """Lifecycle status. While DRAFT the editor definition is editable and codegen is skipped; switching to CONFIRMED triggers scaffold generation."""
  status: StatusType!
}

"""A document type id (e.g. 'powerhouse/document-drive') attached to the editor with a stable entry id."""
type DocumentTypeItem {
  """Stable identifier for the entry; used to remove it."""
  id: OID!
  """Document type id this editor handles (e.g. 'my-org/invoice')."""
  documentType: String!
}

"""
Lifecycle status of a module definition.
- DRAFT: still being edited; codegen does not run.
- CONFIRMED: locked in; codegen produces the corresponding scaffold.
"""
enum StatusType {
  DRAFT
  CONFIRMED
}

modules.name: base_operations
modules.description: Set the editor's identity, lifecycle status, and the document types it handles.

operations.name: SET_EDITOR_NAME
operations.description: Set the display name of the editor. Also determines the generated folder name under `editors/`.

operations.name: ADD_DOCUMENT_TYPE
operations.description: Register a document type this editor can edit. Caller supplies a stable id so the entry can be removed later.

operations.name: REMOVE_DOCUMENT_TYPE
operations.description: Remove a registered document type entry by its id.

operations.name: SET_EDITOR_STATUS
operations.description: Move the editor between DRAFT and CONFIRMED. Codegen only runs once the status is CONFIRMED — leaving it DRAFT means no editor files are produced.
